commit_scope: Wire the agent's Form-first reasoning through the native form-cli router and ensure its kernel is built once on first startup and cached. Adds scripts/ensure_form_cli_kernel.sh (a SessionStart build carrier, idempotent + graceful), updates the committed Claude/Codex session hooks to run it and to route body-first questions through `form-cli ask`, and updates CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / the form-first-reasoning teaching to name the native router. No form/ recipe changes; the body-first routing recipes (form-cli-router/-sufficiency/-judge) already exist and are sibling-proven.
evidence_refs: Discovery: form-cli already routes body-first. `bin/form-cli stats` returned live records — local-suffice rate 42% (3/7 asks held locally), 492 captured oracle->native samples, 1 escalation logged, native tool predictor 84.8% vs 79.9% baseline. bin/form-cli:101 already lazy-builds + caches the Go kernel ([ -x bin-go ] || go build).

Build-once-cache carrier proof: in a fresh worktree bin-go did NOT exist (gitignored per-checkout artifact); running scripts/ensure_form_cli_kernel.sh warmed the kernel in the background; bin-go then appeared (21947282 bytes) and `bin/form-cli stats` ran from it (42% local-suffice). bash -n syntax check passed.

ensure_form_cli_kernel.sh is idempotent (a present binary is an instant no-op), graceful (no Go toolchain -> a note pointing at install/form-cli-install.sh; form-cli's own lazy build is the correctness net), and a carrier only — the routing itself is Form (form-cli-router/-sufficiency/-judge).
JSON parse OK after edits: .claude/settings.json and .codex/hooks.json both load.

Edges in the same commit: scripts/INDEX.md row for the new script (regenerated via generate_repo_indexes.py, which also refreshed MANIFEST.md), and the form-first-reasoning teaching + CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md updated to name `form-cli ask` as the native body-first router with the structural lattice doors underneath.

commands: bash scripts/ensure_form_cli_kernel.sh  (warmed bin-go in background; binary then present)
bin/form-cli stats  (ran off the warmed kernel; 42% local-suffice)

ci_validation.notes: Agent config + a build carrier script + orientation docs; no kernel recipe changed, so no proof band applies. CI has not run yet for this branch.

deploy_validation.notes: Session hooks, a build carrier, and orientation docs; no public HTTP endpoint or service changes. The behavior reaches a session when the repo is opened in a local or cloud agent.

phase_gate.reason: Local verification passed; CI and merge remain pending. No deploy applies to this agent-config change.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: On session start the native Form kernel is built once and cached (idempotent no-op when present), and the agent's Form-first directive now routes body-first questions through `form-cli ask` — the existing native router that grounds in the body and escalates to the remote oracle only when its sufficiency gate says local was not enough.
public_endpoints: none changed; form-cli is a local-first CLI over the Go kernel
test_flows: Build-once-cache: fresh worktree had no bin-go; the ensure carrier built + cached it; form-cli then ran off it.
Routing already lives: form-cli stats shows real body-first records (42% of asks held locally) on the existing sibling-proven sufficiency gate.
